chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH KARACHI C.P.No.D-4898 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________________ Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) 1. For order on office objection 2. For hearing of CMA No.20650 / 2025 3. For hearing of main case 29.10.2025 Mr. Safdar Ali Shah, advocate for the petitioners Mr. Ali Safdar Depar, AAG I.O Mehboob Ali, PS New Pind District Sukkuar & Muhammad Usman Shar, Additional SHO --------- I.O Mehboob Ali, PS New Pind District Sukkuar, is present in Court and states that he has recorded 161 Cr.P.C statement of petitioner No.1 Mst. Humaira and based on her statement, he shall file his report in ‘C’ class before the concerned Judicial Magistrate within days of the date of this order. The instant petition is disposed of in the above terms along with pending application(s). HEAD OF CONST. BENCHES JUDGE Nadir*
